---
name: Security limitation
about: Track a known security, custody, abuse, or operational limitation
title: "[Security limitation]: "
labels: security, limitation
assignees: ""
---

## Limitation

Describe the limitation plainly.

## Impact

What could go wrong if this limitation is misunderstood?

## Affected area

- [ ] Custody
- [ ] Telegram group wallets
- [ ] Discord guild wallets
- [ ] Quote/confirmation flow
- [ ] Storage/concurrency
- [ ] Audit/logging
- [ ] Deployment/operations

## Current mitigation

What does the repo do today to reduce risk?

## Required production fix

What would need to be true before this can be called production-ready?

## Evidence

Link tests, docs, code, or live-smoke notes.
